message:
test(fwc): add 31 lifecycle + config command tests for beads 1g7z0.8/1g7z0.9

Status: fleet/connector scope, host-backed admin details, unknown connector
Pin: missing host, unknown connector resolution
Install: verify-only, invalid source, missing host
Update: missing host, unknown connector, id mismatch
Config: schema (offline/unknown), get/set/unset/import/export/doctor
  missing host, host-backed validation failure, redacted config,
  doctor invalid/redacted, export replayable snapshot

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
